title: coccothrinax miraguama subsp. roseocarpa
intro: Coccothrinax miraguama subsp. roseocarpa, also known as the pink-fruited silver palm, is a subspecies of palm tree native to the Caribbean and Central America. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Coccothrinax miraguama subsp. roseocarpa include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting immune function. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
